Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Evolution Engine]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — Starhammer's Evolution Engine has activated for the fifth time in his life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — The Evolution Engine causes strain on Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — The Evolution Engine can trigger another round with Starhammer if he is beaten but not killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — The Evolution Engine may have improved Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — The Evolution Engine is a device being activated by Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — The Evolution Engine calls on the Aether to adapt a subject.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — The Evolution Engine increases system efficiency by a few percent and is designed to adapt the user.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — The Evolution Engine is designed to develop abilities that its creator could not build.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — The Evolution Engine affects the mind of its subject.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — The Evolution Engine optimizes the subject's mindset to solve problems at the expense of their personality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — The Evolution Engine's activations cause significant changes in Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — The Evolution Engine is an Aether-dependent system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — A spell can stop Starhammer's Evolution Engine.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — The Evolution Engine triggers when noticed by everyone in the sector.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
